name: Evolve:Mecha Squad
short_description: Build mechas, form mecha teams, and command them to fight.
detailed_description:
Build mechas, form mecha teams, and command them to fight.

Build

Choose a mecha as a prototype and up to three mechas as references. The basic properties of the new mecha are determined by them. Mechas of different models and properties will have different effects on the manufacturing results. Do you want to improve steadily or pursue a sudden success? It's all up to you.
In order to defeat stronger enemies, you need to continuously build and ensure that you have enough powerful mechas.

Weapons

Buy suitable weapons for them according to their properties and skills.

Battle

Set AI behavior patterns and assign them responsibilities in the team. Give priority to attacking elite enemies, or give priority to protecting the base and teammates.
Mechas have powerful skills. Casting skills in critical moments can quickly turn the tide of the battle.
